name: Midsona AB (publ)
summary: Midsona AB (publ) develops, produces, and markets organic products, health foods, and consumer health products in Sweden, Norway, Finland, Denmark, Spain, France, and Germany. The company offers grains, flakes, seeds, vegetables, pasta, and rice under the Happy Bio brand name; vegetable proteins, including fresh plant-based products under the Vegetalia brand name; roasted grains and cereals under the Celnat brand name; shakes, smoothies, bars, and drink mixes for weight control under the Naturdiet brand name; fish oils under the Eskimo-3 brand name; rice, cereal, flakes, dried fruits, nuts, etc. under the Davert brand; and nuts, kernels, dried fruits, and berries under the Earth Control brand. It also provides dry fruits, nuts, oils, spices, fruit creams, muesli, rice, and pastas, as well as body and hair care products under the Urtekram brand name; oils, grains, pastas, bouillons, and flours under the Kung Markatta brand name; corn cakes, rice cakes, dietary supplements, and teas under the Friggs brand name; and breads, beverages, cold cuts, dinners, accessories, pasta sauces, pesto, oils, sugar, syrups, nuts, seeds, flours, and teas under the Helios brand name. The company sells its products through FMCG retailers, health food retailers, pharmacies, other specialist retailers, and other sales channels. Midsona AB (publ) was founded in 1892 and is headquartered in Malm√É¬∂, Sweden.
